title: CoreX
description: CoreX is a Minecraft 1.21.5 build that enhances your gameplay with carefully selected QOL mods.
body:
**CoreX** - is a powerful and dynamic Minecraft 1.21.5 build that retains the essence of the classic gameplay while adding client-side mods to enhance performance, convenience, and visuals. Designed for players who want to maximize their Minecraft experience without altering the core mechanics, it’s perfect for both single-player and multiplayer sessions. The build features carefully selected mods that optimize client performance and improve stability, all without disrupting the vanilla atmosphere. Build, explore, conquer — all the possibilities of the game are unlocked in CoreX.

Simply Optimized - 281 FPS max

CoreX - 370 FPS max

Recommended resourcepacks:

[Vanilla Evolved](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/vanilla-evolved)

[Darked](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/darked)

[Fontolith](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fontolith)

Recommended JVM Arguments:

-Xmx6G -Xms6G -XX:+UnlockExperimentalVMOptions -XX:+UseG1GC -XX:G1NewSizePercent=20 -XX:G1MaxNewSizePercent=60 -XX:G1HeapRegionSize=32M -XX:G1ReservePercent=15 -XX:MaxGCPauseMillis=100 -XX:+ParallelRefProcEnabled -XX:+AlwaysPreTouch -XX:+UseStringDeduplication

<details>
<summary>Mods</summary>

ScalableLux

3DSkinLayers

AlinLib

AppleSkin

BadOptimizations

ChatAnimation

ClothConfig

C2ME

CustomFOV

Debugify

DynamicCrosshair

EntityCulling

FabricApi

FabricLanguageKotlin

FerritCore

StarHUD

Zoomify

ImmediatelyFast

IrisShaders

KelUI

Krypton

Lithium

MinecraftCursor

ModMenu

Puzzle

ReesesSodiumOptions

ScoreboardOverhaul

Sodium

SodiumExtra

TextPlaceholder

ThreadTweak

VeryManyPlayers

ViaFabricPlus

YetAnotherConfigLib

PlaceholderApi

</details>

Minimum requirements:
CPU: 2 cores, 4 threads.
RAM: 4 GB of memory.
Storage: 2 GB of free disk space.
GPU: Integrated with the processor.
